programmes.show_description: 90s Feel Good... 24/7! Love Britney, Backstreet Boys and other pop icons? You're in the right place!
Sounding as good as they did in the 90s with all your favourite hits from the decade that brought us Britney, Christina Aguilera, Take That and Destiny's Child.
There's nothing better than singing along to all your 90s favourites. Tune in to Heart 90s for all the best pop bangers, smash hits and forgotten favourites.

90s Feel Good... 24/7! Love Britney, Backstreet Boys and other pop icons? You're in the right place!
Join Kevin Hughes for Heart 90s Breakfast! He's got the hits from the 90s, plus gossip and good times!
